calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner Rodney Lim (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration.

There being no objection, the Court granted the petition and signed the order in open court.

The Court noted that the instrument lodged in the Court's will file did not appear to be a duplicate original and that the presumption of revocation applied.

Bond was fixed at $20,000. The Court appointed Michael Kasolas as probate referee and disclosed on the record that he is married to a legal advisory staff member of the Court.

The Court set a status hearing for Status on Close of Estate for October 26, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner Rodney Lim (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court raised concerns regarding whether the presumption of revocation applied and whether the document submitted constituted an admissible duplicate original, noting issues concerning execution and authenticity. Counsel addressed the Court's concerns and indicated that further authority or evidence might be required.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow petitioner an opportunity to file additional authority or evidence in support of admission of the will, or to locate the original will.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Feb-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Jan-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lawrence Adamsky, specially appearing for attorney Thomas Wrobel, for petitioner Rodney Lim (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court noted that the will submitted bore the word "copy" at the top and contained "/s/" at the signature line. Mr. Adamsky, who was specially appearing, was unable to provide further information. The Court stated that it had determined that the document was a copy, not the original will, and suggested that Mr. Wrobel file an amended petition for probate of lost will.

Following discussion, the matter was continued to January 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
